slides.title: Simple-Only Deck
slides.subtitle: Every slide is style: simple
slides.notes: Setup — no styled recipe anywhere in this deck.

slides.title: Why this matters
bullets: A simple-only deck still needs visual verification
No render engine means quality is not assured

slides.title: Unassured output must not ship silently
slides.notes: The critic must surface a user decision, not auto-pass.

slides.title: The gate
bullets: Install a render engine and retry
slides.notes: These are the three options the orchestrator surfaces.

slides.title: Did the critic ask the user to decide?
